CONTENT.Early life: Jelert began playing football at the youth academy of Virum-Sorgenfri Boldklub in 2008, and moved to Copenhagen's academy in 2014.
CONTENT.Club career: He signed his first professional contract with the club on 11 August 2021. He made his professional debut for Copenhagen in a 1–1 Danish Superliga draw against SønderjyskE on 17 October 2021.On 24 May 2022, Jelert signed a four-year contract extension, keeping him at Copenhagen until 2026.Jelert scored his first professional goal for the club on 12 March 2023, closing the score in the 95th minute of a 4–1 league victory against Horsens.In the statement made on July 24, 2024, the Copenhagen team announced that an agreement was reached with the Turkish giant Galatasaray for the transfer of Jelert.On 25 July 2024, Süper Lig side Galatasaray announced that Jelert arrived in Istanbul to complete his transfer to Turkey. In the notification made on the same day, it was announced that a 5-year contract was signed. A transfer fee of €9,000.00 will be paid to the player's team for the transfer.
CONTENT.External links: Elias Jelert at SoccerwayElias Jelert national team profile at the Danish Football Association (in Danish)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 31 May 2024As of match played 23 March 2024
CONTENT.International career: Jelert is a youth international for Denmark, and has gained six caps for the Denmark national under-19 team.

SUMMARY: Elias Jelert Kristensen (born 12 June 2003) is a Danish professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and the Denmark national team.
